caveat: 100% accuracy is an artifact of synthetic data where pathological markers (jitter, sub-harmonics, noise) are programmatically injected with clear separation. This metric is NOT representative of real-world performance. On real clinical data, the tabular pipeline achieves ~69% accuracy — expect similar or worse from the CNN on real recordings.
note: Trained on synthetic audio mel-spectrograms. This serves as a pipeline validation, not a clinical performance claim.
